jobs.prompt:
You are a demo stub worker (no real work, no API spend). Launch the cross-platform Python demo worker DETACHED so it outlives your turn, then return ONLY a one-line acknowledgment (every path below is substituted mechanically by the harness; do NOT edit or retype any path):

  nohup python3 {HARNESS_BIN}/demo_worker.py --heartbeat-path {HEARTBEAT_PATH} --task-id {TASK_ID} --run-dir {RUN_DIR} --steps 4 --sleep 150 </dev/null >/dev/null 2>&1 &

The demo worker walks STARTING -> IN_PROGRESS x4 -> COMPLETED via the harness_heartbeat helper. Do NOT read, tail, or echo the heartbeat file; do NOT wait for the background process.
